overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy inside The Three Broomsticks tavern. The player character stands in the warm, candlelit medieval interior with wooden balconies, stone fireplace, and ambient NPCs seated at tables. The atmosphere is cozy and immersive with detailed traditional tavern furnishings and dim firelight.

entered.detail: wooden railed balcony on the second floor overlooking the main hall
large circular iron chandelier with candles hanging from the ceiling
illuminated tavern sign mounted above the fireplace
large stone fireplace with glowing fire inside
wooden tables and benches arranged for dining
wall-mounted candle holders providing warm ambient light
framed pictures and decorations on the wooden wall

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary perspective within the cozy, candlelit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern, maintaining a focused gaze on the medieval architecture. It begins with the player character facing a large stone fireplace and upper wooden balconies, where warm light from wall sconces casts a soft glow over NPCs seated at nearby tables. As the scene unfolds, a tavern patron walks across the left side of the frame, momentarily adding movement to the otherwise still and immersive environment. The camera then lingers on the quiet atmosphere of the main hall before the character briefly raises a hand to their head in a subtle gesture. The sequence concludes with the character remaining poised in the dim firelight, surrounded by the detailed wooden furnishings of the tavern.
